subject: Suzlon Energy Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts |SUBJECT: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
message:
Broadcast: 23-Jul-2026 10:44:34
Suzlon Energy Limited
Rating: 7/10 — Good opportunity

Order: 64 units of S144 (3.15 MW) wind turbines totaling 201.6 MW for Waaree Forever Energies Private Limited; order value undisclosed

Verdict: Significant order demonstrating Suzlon's strong market position in Andhra Pradesh with cumulative orderbook near 1 GW in the state. Second consecutive DevCo-led EPC order within a week indicates growing industry adoption of this execution model and validates Suzlon's strategic positioning. Order value undisclosed limiting full impact assessment, but order size and consecutive wins suggest positive momentum in core wind business. Recommend Watchlist pending quarterly results to quantify revenue impact.

subject: Ptc Industries Limited has informed the Exchange about Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts |SUBJECT: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
message:
Broadcast: 23-Jul-2026 11:04:44
PTC Industries Limited
Rating: 6/10 — Watchlist

Order: Design and development order for Titanium Cradle component from ARDE, DRDO for Indian Light Weight Tank; order value undisclosed

Verdict: PTC Industries has secured a strategic DRDO order marking entry into mission-critical defence component design, which validates capability in advanced manufacturing. However, the order value is not disclosed, making revenue impact assessment impossible and limiting the significance evaluation. The contract appears prestigious for credibility and future defence business pipeline but lack of financial details and confirmation of actual manufacturing orders (versus design phase only) warrant monitoring. Watchlist status appropriate pending quarterly results disclosure of order book impact.
